records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Usually, I'm the one who makes the proposal. This time, I'm on the opposite end.

records.m_Talk_FRA: C'est moi qui prends les devants, d'habitude. Cette fois, je me retrouve dans l'autre r9580le.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is not a bad offer. I've worked with many companies before, but none of them has inspired me as yours has.
